reviews.review_description:
Most fun I've had in ages, played using the rotovr chair which is perfect on a game like this

The dimamic shadows and the lighting put this game above many more expensive games, very fast paced with plenty of jump scares. The Graphics are sharp and detailed.

Nice to see the number of available options in settings, which should meet most people's needs.

Devs have done an amazing job on this game hopefully a few more environments can be added in future updates.

The game is alive and still supported! We proved that with the huge update released just a few days ago. More big updates are coming in the new year, and maybe even new maps! Thank you for your support.

reviews.review_description:
Got this as I love wave shooters.  Was not disappointed. Great looking, nice lighting. 

Only thing was, played one wave, and halfway through second wave it just crashed. 

Can't hold shotgun or machine guns with both hands.

If you grab a shotgun, you lose a weapon in the other hand. 

Can't wait for any updates, great effort👍

Loose a star because of the crashing.

developer_response.body:
Hey OversizeWizard, thanks so much for the review! We just pushed a huge update for Mutated Virus a few days ago, so I’m really happy you’re enjoying it.

About the crash  it was probably just a random thing. Try giving your Quest a quick restart. I’ve played hundreds of hours myself without a single crash, so hopefully it won’t happen again. If it does though, just drop me a message at anomosstudios@gmail.com
 and I’ll sort it out.

Really appreciate the support

reviews.review_description:
Mutated Virus feels like what Resident Evil’s VR arena mode should have been. It’s a masterful extension of that intense survival formula, with just the right amount of progression. Bonuses are there, sure—but it’s your real-world shooting skills that make the difference.

There’s a wide variety of levels, each with a distinct atmosphere that really pulls you in. The graphics are solid, the controls are tight, and the immersion is deep. I actually had to stop playing at one point after reaching a save area—it’s that intense. The tension, the lighting, the sound design… especially the creepy music—it all comes together to make you feel truly unsettled.

This is a standout title for any serious VR gamer. A fantastic achievement that deserves more attention.

April 18 2025
Major Update Released (Version 4.2)

* Upgraded physics system
* Enjoy Near-4K Visuals!

**More detailed information about the Update you can

reviews.review_description: Super fun,  fast paced shooter. Mutated Virus is a fast paced fun zombie wave shooter that gets you moving right out of the gate. The weapons are cool and the different perks like time slow down that you find around the map are awesome. The heavy metal music goes perfect with the game,  as well as the arena announcer who calls out all your awesome kills. Lots of fun to be had with this inexpensive horror shooter.

developer_response.body: Hey mashdaddycool! We're very glad that you liked the game.

reviews.review_description:
Video review: https://youtu.be/n4YaSTK29_I

A VR zombie wave shooter for Meta Quest is called Mutated Virus. Waves of zombie invasions must be resisted. To stay alive, move around the level, collecting health packs, weapons, and ammunition. If you own the Quest or Quest 2, the game's gorgeous, atmospheric levels make it a fantastic virtual reality (VR) game to play on Halloween. The mechanics are simple, so your main focus should be dodging the enemies and shooting them down.

I love the third level, I think the level design with the hills and the complete darkness but your torchlight makes it scary, immersive, and more exciting to play, especially in VR. Shooting feels good, and waves become more challenging as you progress.

On the downside, I felt annoyed not being able to hand-lock hold on the shotgun or assault rifle (so I played make-believe but held it with one hand for most part), and I would prefer it if there were more levels to explore and more cool powerups. Although I liked the simplified loading mechanics, I prefer it has a controller movement rather than just pressing a button with a nice sound effect.

Overall, a good wave shooter for those who don't like complex mechanics and prefer to just run and gun. It is also a good scary game to play on Halloween. Make sure to unlock the last level, it's really fun! - Enjoy.

reviews.review_title: a Gorgeous Oculus Quest 2 Zombie Shooter
reviews.review_description:
Video Review : https://youtu.be/bNrsVc9ETjg

Mutated Virus is a zombie wave shooter where you roam around 3 different maps surviving well waves of zombies and other zombie like creatures. You have tons of weapons scattered around the level to pick up as well as power ups to slow time, move faster, explosive tornado and more.  Control wise its smooth locomotion and snap turning with an optional laser pointer for those in need. 

This game is pretty much a mindless shooter that is really easy to pickup and play, seated or standing it works fine. But its strengths come with how nice the game looks graphically in the headset, enemies character models are very high resolution to the point it truly does look a lot closer to a PC VR game then an Oculus Quest title. 

I do admit the title isn't perfect and it does have some minor bugs the developer is still working on patching out but for the $5 price tag its really hard not to recommend it for those looking for some mindless zombie slaying fun.

reviews.review_title: A game to jump into for some fun but…
reviews.review_description:
This game is a pretty fun game it’s not amazing but it is built very well. No glitches and is generally fun to play with decent graphics for the quest 2

But with all that said this game is the type of game i would only play a couple times and might forget about. It’s a game to just shoot stuff in and doesn’t offer much of anything else. I don’t feel like I’m getting anywhere when playing. I’m just shooting waves of zombies while walking around and finding new weapons. It feels like this game is missing something to get me hooked but i don’t know what it is 

Visit my YouTube channel (vr link) for tips and reviews with the oculus quest 2

reviews.review_description:
This is a commendable indie effort. I applaud the devs for this game. The character models, the weapon designs, the attention paid to those details, coupled with the fact that this is an independent creation, I'm able to give it high marks out of principle alone. Playing it seated is not reccommended, as I tried that, but when standing it was a completely different and quite immersive experience. Smooth turning should be implemented by the end of October as well. Based on that info directly from the developer, I have reason to suspect there may be other updates to come as well. So, for the price tag and what's offered, plus what's to come, Mutated Virus gets two thumbs up from me! 
Review video https://youtu.be/spLUv3s6yHM
